name: @promptbus/promptbus
description: Local proxy that routes Claude Code requests to the cheapest capable model

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "fs.rmSync('dist/dashboard/public', {recursive: true, force: true}); fs.cpSync('src/dashboard/public', 'dist/dashboard/public', {recursive: true})" && find dist -name "*.test.*" -delete && chmod +x dist/cli/index.js
scripts.postinstall: echo 'PromptBus installed. Run "promptbus start" to begin.'
